questions.question: Does createBackupEvent encrypt with NIP-44 and produce kind 30078 with d:quizzl tag?
Does publishBackup collect payload, encrypt, sign, and publish via NDK?
Does fetchBackup fetch kind 30078, decrypt with NIP-44, and validate version:1?
Does fetchBackup return null when no backup exists on relays?
Does fetchBackup pick the newest event when multiple are returned?
Does getBackupRelays read from kind 30051 and fall back to DEFAULT_RELAYS?
Do all tests pass (baseline + S1 + S2)?
